product.name: LitigAI
product.description: Legal AI software — demand letter drafting, new lawsuit drafting, automated deadlines, file management, strategic guidance
product.focus: Civil litigation (demand letters + civil suits). JuristAI is the umbrella brand covering criminal, family law, startup law etc.

icp_journeys.attorney_b2b: 200+ case management — disorganized templates, manual spreadsheet deadlines not linked to calendar, can't find docs. LitigAI solves: organized templates, automated deadlines, calendar integration, file mgmt across cases.
icp_journeys.pro_se_b2c: Normal person unsure if they can sue → platform guides them → buys demand letter → automated 2-week follow-up email → if unresolved, platform walks through full case setup step by step.
